---
title: "Figure 1 plots"
output: html_document
date: '2025-01-28'
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(Seurat)
library(Signac)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyverse)
library(MuDataSeurat, lib.loc = "~/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/4.3/")
library(pheatmap)
library(effsize)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(effsize,lib.loc = "~/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/4.3/")


TKO_final_arc <- readRDS("/oak/stanford/scg/lab_julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/TKO_final_arc.rds")
DefaultAssay(TKO_final_arc) = "SCT"

TKO_final_arc@meta.data <- TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>%
  mutate(cell_type = case_when(
    archaetype == "Generalist" & old.ident %in% c("NE_1", "NE_2", "NE_3", "NE_4", "NE_5", "NE_6", "NE_7", "NE_8", "NE_9", "NE_10") ~ "Generalist NE",
    archaetype == "Generalist" & old.ident  %in% c("Club cells_1", "Club cells_2", "AT2 cells", "Club cells_3", "Cilliated cells","Endothelial cells")  ~ "Generalist nonNE",
    TRUE ~ archaetype
  ))

```

```{r}

#Reassigning identity levels
TKO_final_arc@active.ident <- factor(TKO_final_arc@active.ident, 
                            levels=c("Neuroendocrine1", 
                                     "Neuroendocrine2",
                                     "Stress", 
                                     "Intermediate", 
                                     "nonNE1", 
                                     "nonNE2", 
                                     "Generalist NE",
                                     "Generalist nonNE"
                                     ))

###Figure 1b: arc-PCA
setwd("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/Figures/Figure 1/")

ARC_pca =DimPlot(TKO_final_arc, reduction = "harmony_2",pt.size = 0.75, dims = c(1,3), alpha = 0.6, cols = c("#ddd9d8","gray70","#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","#f10c13","#f27a30","#4e8ee6"), order = c("Intermediate","nonNE2","nonNE1","Stress","Neuroendocrine2","Neuroendocrine1", "Generalist NE","Generalist nonNE")) + ggtitle("PCA")

ARC_pca

ggsave(ARC_pca, 
       filename = "/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/Figures/Figure 1/Archetype_pca_Final.pdf",
       device = "pdf",
       height = 6, width = 9, units = "in")

#3D plot
TKO_final_arc$archaetype = Idents(TKO_final_arc)

library(plotly)
plotting.data <- FetchData(object = TKO_final_arc, vars = c("harmony2_1", "harmony2_2", "harmony2_3", "archaetype"))
plotting.data$custom_opacity <- ifelse(plotting.data$archaetype %in% c("Generalist"), 0.5, 1)
plot_ly(data = plotting.data, x = ~harmony2_1, y = ~harmony2_2, z = ~harmony2_3,color = ~archaetype,
        colors = c("#3eab32","#8e403a","#cb76da","#f10c13","#f27a30","#4e8ee6","#ece8e6"), 
        marker = list(size = 1.5, width=0.75), # controls size of points
        hoverinfo="text",
        opacity = plotting.data$custom_opacity,
         mode = "markers",
        order = c("Intermediate","nonNE2","nonNE1","Stress","Neuroendocrine2","Neuroendocrine1", "Generalist"),
 type = "scatter3d")

```

```{r}
###Extended Data Figure 2a
Arc_marker_genes <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/Arc.marker_genes.csv") #Supplemental Table S1

Arc_marker_genes %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  top_n(n = 20, wt = avg_log2FC) -> top20

top20 = subset(top20,!top20$cluster %in% "Generalist")

arc_specilist = TKO_final_arc@meta.data[!TKO_final_arc@meta.data$archaetype %in% "Generalist",]
Idents(TKO_final_arc) = "archaetype"
mapal <- colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8,"RdBu"))(256)

DoHeatmap(TKO_final_arc, features = top20$gene, cells = rownames(arc_specilist), raster = F, disp.min = -2, disp.max = 2) +scale_fill_gradientn(colours = rev(mapal))+ theme(text = element_text(size = 7.5))+NoLegend()

```

```{r}
#module score calculation and plots
#NE gene score (Lissa et al.,)
NE_genes = as.list("Ascl1","Insm1","Chga","Tgln3","Kif5c","Uchl1","Crmp1","Scg3","Syt4","Rtn1", "Myt1","Syp","Kif1a","Tmsb15a","Syn1","Syt11","Tff3","Rundc3a","Chgb","Fam57b","Sh3gl2","Bsn","Sez6","Tmsb15b","Celf3","Grp","Ddc" ,"Ncam1")

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = NE_genes, name = "NE_score", ctrl = 25, assay = "SCT")

# Fetch only the required gene set category
hallmark <- msigdbr(species = "mouse", category = c("H"))
M5 <- msigdbr(species = "mouse", category = c("C5"))

# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
  PS = "HALLMARK_PROTEIN_SECRETION",
  EMT = "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION",
  INFLAM= "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE"
 )
gene_sets_2 = list(AP ="GOBP_ANTIGEN_PROCESSING_AND_PRESENTATION_OF_ENDOGENOUS_ANTIGEN",
                   INFLAM_GOBP = "GOBP_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE")

# Function to extract genes for a given gene set
extract_genes <- function(gs_name) {
  hallmark %>%
    filter(gs_name == !!gs_name) %>%
    pull(gene_symbol)
}

extract_genes_2 <- function(gs_name) {
  M5 %>%
    filter(gs_name == !!gs_name) %>%
    pull(gene_symbol)
}

# Extract genes for all gene sets
gene_lists <- lapply(gene_sets, extract_genes)
gene_lists_2 <- lapply(gene_sets_2, extract_genes_2)

# Define control parameters
ctrl_params <- list(PS = 100, EMT = 105, INFLAM = 100)
ctrl_params_2 <- list(AP = 29, INFLAM_GOBP = 800)

# Add module scores for all gene sets
for (name in names(gene_sets)) {
  TKO_final_arc <- AddModuleScore(
    object = TKO_final_arc,
    features = list(gene_lists[[name]]),
    name = paste0(name, "_score"),
    ctrl = ctrl_params[[name]],
    assay = "SCT",
    nbin = 12
  )
}

for (name in names(gene_sets_2)) {
  TKO_final_arc <- AddModuleScore(
    object = TKO_final_arc,
    features = list(gene_lists_2[[name]]),
    name = paste0(name, "_score"),
    ctrl = ctrl_params_2[[name]],
    assay = "SCT",
    slot = "counts",
    nbin = 12
  )
}
#Yang et al Cell 2016
###Supplemental table S3
NFIB_upregulatedGenes <- read_excel("/labs/julsage/Debbie/files/NFIB-upregulatedGenes.xlsx", 
    col_names = FALSE)

Nfib_targets = list(NFIB_upregulatedGenes$...1)
TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = Nfib_targets, name = "Nfib_score", ctrl = 200, assay = "SCT", nbin = 12)

###Extended data Figure 2b
signatures = c("NE_score1","Nfib_score1","PS_score1","EMT_score1","INFLAM_score1")

P3 = VlnPlot(
  object = TKO_final_arc,
  features = signatures,
  idents = c("Neuroendocrine1", "Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2"),
  pt.size = 0.3,
  stack = TRUE, flip = TRUE, cols = c("#c80a0a","#f90707","#f56d73","#f1adb0","#e3d3d3","#c0d3f3","#6e9bea","#3a7bee","#0c44a6"))+ xlab("") + ylab("") + theme(legend.position = "none")

labels = c("NE score","Nfib targets", "Protein secretion","EMT signature","Inflammation signature")

P3$data$feature= factor(P3$data$feature, 
                                      levels = signatures, 
                                      labels = labels)

Module_score_vln = P3+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, size = 10), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

```

```{r}
###Extended Figure 2c
Idents(TKO_final_arc) = "cell_type"
#proportion of cells in each cell cycle phase
prop_cells = table(Idents(TKO_final_arc), TKO_final_arc$Phase)
prop_cells = data.frame(prop_cells)
colnames(prop_cells) = c("Identity","Phase","Number")

prop_cells$Phase <- factor(prop_cells$Phase,
              levels = c("G1","S","G2M"))

prop_cells$Identity <- factor(prop_cells$Identity,
              levels = c("Generalist nonNE","nonNE2","nonNE1","Intermediate","Generalist NE","Stress","Neuroendocrine2","Neuroendocrine1"))

cell_prop = ggplot(data=prop_cells, aes(x=Identity, y=Number, fill=Phase)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", position = "fill") +scale_fill_manual(values = c("#F0C90A","#8E6DF0","#446BE4"))+coord_flip()
  theme_bw() + RotatedAxis()+theme(axis.text=element_text(size=10),
                                        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold")) + xlab("")
```

```{r}
#Murine NE score
#HES1 negative cells
###Supplemental table S3
HES1_low <- read_excel("/labs/julsage/Debbie/files/41467_2022_30416_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx", 
    sheet = "padj<0.05 log2fold <-1.0")
HES1_low_sig = subset(HES1_low, HES1_low$log2FoldChange <= -1.5)
HES1_low_sig = subset(HES1_low_sig, HES1_low_sig$padj < 0.0001)

HES1_low_sig = list(HES1_low_sig$gene_id)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = HES1_low_sig, name = "HES1_low_score", ctrl = 900, assay = "SCT", nbin = 12, slot = "counts")

#Murine nonNE score
#HES1 postive cells
HES1_high <- read_excel("/labs/julsage/Debbie/files/41467_2022_30416_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx", 
    sheet = "padj<0.05 log2fold > 1.0")
HES1_high_sig = subset(HES1_high, HES1_high$log2FoldChange > 2.5)
HES1_high_sig = subset(HES1_high_sig, HES1_high_sig$padj < 0.0001)

HES1_high_sig = list(HES1_high_sig$gene_id)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = HES1_high_sig, name = "HES1_high_score", ctrl = 500, assay = "SCT", nbin = 12, slot = "counts")

###Figure 1c
df <- TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>%
  filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(
    cell_type = factor(cell_type,
                       levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE",
                                  "Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE")),
   NE_z = as.numeric(scale(HES1_low_score1)),
    nonNE_z = as.numeric(scale(HES1_high_score1))
  )

color_map <- c("Neuroendocrine1" = "#cb76da",
               "Neuroendocrine2" = "#8e403a",
               "Stress"          = "#3eab32",
               "Intermediate"    = "#4e8ee6",
               "nonNE1"          = "#f10c13",
               "nonNE2"          = "#f27a30"
               )

df_other <- df %>% filter(cell_type != "Intermediate")
df_inter <- df %>% filter(cell_type == "Intermediate")

# ── 3. Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_density_2d(data      = df_other,
                 aes(x     = NE_z,
                    y     = nonNE_z,
                     color = cell_type),
                 linewidth = 1,
                  alpha     = 0.5,     # ← muted background
                bins      = 6,        # ← fewer levels = no splitting
                  adjust    = 1) +    # ← extra smoothing
  # Intermediate — high alpha, same smoothing
  geom_density_2d(data      = df_inter,
                  aes(x     = NE_z,
                      y     = nonNE_z),
                  color     = "#4e8ee6",
                  linewidth = 1,
                  alpha     = 1.0,      # ← fully opaque
                  bins      = 5,
                  adjust    = 1) +
  
  geom_point(data  = df_inter,
             aes(x = NE_z, y = nonNE_z),
             color = "#4e8ee6",
             size  = 0.8,
             alpha = 0.5) +
  # Reference lines
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_map, name = "Cell type") +
  labs(
    x     = "ASCL1 target score (z-scored)",
    y     = "nonNE score (z-scored)",
    title = "Cell state distribution across ASCL1 and nonNE axes"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    text            = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(linewidth = 2, alpha = 1)))
p
```

```{r}
###Figure 1d-f
#NE score
HES1_high =  TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=HES1_high_score1, fill=cell_type)) +
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("nonNE genes") +
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

HES1_low =  TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=HES1_low_score1, fill=cell_type)) +
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("nonNE genes") +
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

AP = TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE")))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=AP_score1, fill=cell_type))+
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("AP genes") +
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

P = HES1_high+HES1_low+AP
P

#Cliff's delta

score_cols <- c("HES1_low_score1", "HES1_high_score1", "AP_score1")
group_col  <- "cell_type"
ref_group  <- "Intermediate"   # <-- reference group for all comparisons

meta   <- TKO_final_arc@meta.data
groups <- setdiff(unique(meta[[group_col]]), ref_group)  # all groups except Intermediate

# Build pairs: Intermediate vs every other group
pairs  <- lapply(groups, function(g) c(ref_group, g))

# --- Loop over all scores and all pairs ---
all_results <- lapply(score_cols, function(score_col) {
  
  pair_results <- lapply(pairs, function(pair) {
    g1 <- na.omit(meta[meta[[group_col]] == pair[1], score_col])
    g2 <- na.omit(meta[meta[[group_col]] == pair[2], score_col])
    
    if (length(g1) < 3 | length(g2) < 3) {
      message(sprintf("Skipping %s | %s vs %s — insufficient cells (n1=%d, n2=%d)",
                      score_col, pair[1], pair[2], length(g1), length(g2)))
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    cd <- cliff.delta(g1, g2)
    
    data.frame(
      Score      = score_col,
      Group1     = pair[1],
      Group2     = pair[2],
      n1         = length(g1),
      n2         = length(g2),
      Delta      = round(cd$estimate, 4),
      CI_lower   = round(cd$conf.int[1], 4),
      CI_upper   = round(cd$conf.int[2], 4),
      Magnitude  = as.character(cd$magnitude)
    )
  })
  
  do.call(rbind, Filter(Negate(is.null), pair_results))
})

all_results_df <- do.call(rbind, all_results)

# --- Print results grouped by score ---
for (sc in score_cols) {
  cat("\n===", sc, "===\n")
  print(all_results_df[all_results_df$Score == sc, -1], row.names = FALSE)
}

```


```{r}
###Extended Data 2f
Intermediate_vs_NE <- FindMarkers(TKO_final_arc, ident.1 = "Intermediate", ident.2 = c("Neuroendocrine1", "Neuroendocrine2"), logfc.threshold = 0, min.pct = 0.02)

keyvals <- ifelse(
     Intermediate_vs_NE$avg_log2FC < -1.5, 'royalblue',
       ifelse(Intermediate_vs_NE$avg_log2FC > 1.5, "#b2182b",
         'black'))
   keyvals[is.na(keyvals)] <- 'lightgrey'
   names(keyvals)[keyvals == '#b2182b'] <- 'high'
   names(keyvals)[keyvals == 'lightgrey'] <- 'mid'
   names(keyvals)[keyvals == 'royalblue'] <- 'low'

IntvsNE = EnhancedVolcano(Intermediate_vs_NE,
     lab = rownames(Intermediate_vs_NE),
     x = 'avg_log2FC',
     y = 'p_val_adj',
   FCcutoff = 1.5,
   pCutoff = 10e-4,
  pointSize = 2,
   labSize = 5,
 selectLab = c('Ncam1','Meis2','Cp',
    "Cd36",'H2-Ab1','Myc','Cd74','Rest',"Nrxn1","Robo1","H2-K1","H2-D1","Kcnip4","Mecom","Spock1","Cacna2d1","Rorb","Syt7","B2m","Chga","Eya2","Prdm16"),
     shape = c(6, 4, 2, 11),
     colCustom = keyvals,
     colAlpha = 0.5,
     legendPosition = 'left',
     legendLabSize = 15,
     legendIconSize = 5.0,
    drawConnectors = TRUE,
     widthConnectors = 1.0,
     colConnectors = 'black',
     arrowheads = FALSE,
    gridlines.major = TRUE,
     gridlines.minor = FALSE,
     border = 'partial',
     borderWidth = 1.5,
     borderColour = 'black')

```

```{r}
convertHumanGeneList <- function(x){
  require("biomaRt")
  human = useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl",host = "dec2021.archive.ensembl.org")
  mouse = useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl",host = "dec2021.archive.ensembl.org" )
  genesV2 = getLDS(attributes = c("hgnc_symbol"), filters = "hgnc_symbol", values = x , mart = human, attributesL = c("mgi_symbol"), martL = mouse, uniqueRows=T)
  humanx <- unique(genesV2[, 2])
  # Print the first 6 genes found to the screen
  print(head(humanx))
  return(humanx)
}

#Nabet 2024, NMF3
SCLC_NE_I = read_excel("/oak/stanford/scg/lab_julsage/Debbie/files/1-s2.0-S1535610824000151-mmc3.xlsx", 
     sheet = "NMF3-Others")

SCLC_NE_I_up = subset(SCLC_NE_I, SCLC_NE_I$logFC >= 1.5)
SCLC_NE_I_up = subset(SCLC_NE_I_up, SCLC_NE_I_up$adj.P.Val <= 0.01)

convertHumanGeneList <- function(x){
  require("biomaRt")
  human = useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl",host = "dec2021.archive.ensembl.org")
  mouse = useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl",host = "dec2021.archive.ensembl.org" )
  genesV2 = getLDS(attributes = c("hgnc_symbol"), filters = "hgnc_symbol", values = x , mart = human, attributesL = c("mgi_symbol"), martL = mouse, uniqueRows=T)
  humanx <- unique(genesV2[, 2])
  # Print the first 6 genes found to the screen
  print(head(humanx))
  return(humanx)
}

SCLC_neI_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_NE_I_up$symbol)

SCLC_neI_ms = list(SCLC_neI_ms)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = SCLC_neI_ms, name = "SCLC_neI_score",assay = "SCT")

#NMF4
SCLC_nonNE_I = read_excel("/oak/stanford/scg/lab_julsage/Debbie/files/1-s2.0-S1535610824000151-mmc3.xlsx", 
     sheet = "NMF4-Others")

SCLC_nonNE_I_up = subset(SCLC_nonNE_I, SCLC_nonNE_I$logFC >= 1)
SCLC_nonNE_I_up = subset(SCLC_nonNE_I_up, SCLC_nonNE_I_up$adj.P.Val <= 0.01)

SCLC_nneI_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_nonNE_I_up$symbol)
SCLC_nneI_ms = list(SCLC_nneI_ms)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = SCLC_nneI_ms, name = "SCLC_nneI_score",assay = "SCT")

#NMF2
SCLC_A = read_excel("/oak/stanford/scg/lab_julsage/Debbie/files/1-s2.0-S1535610824000151-mmc3.xlsx", 
    sheet = "NMF2-Others")

SCLC_A_up = subset(SCLC_A, SCLC_A$logFC >= 1.0)
SCLC_A_up = subset(SCLC_A_up, SCLC_A_up$adj.P.Val <= 0.01)

SCLC_A_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_A_up$symbol)
SCLC_A_ms = list(SCLC_A_ms)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = SCLC_A_ms, name = "SCLC_A_score",assay = "SCT")

#NMF1
SCLC_N = read_excel("/oak/stanford/scg/lab_julsage/Debbie/files/1-s2.0-S1535610824000151-mmc3.xlsx", 
    sheet = "NMF1-Others")

SCLC_N_up = subset(SCLC_N, SCLC_N$logFC >= 1.5)
SCLC_N_up = subset(SCLC_N_up, SCLC_N_up$adj.P.Val <= 0.01)

SCLC_N_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_N_up$symbol)
SCLC_N_ms = list(SCLC_N_ms)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = SCLC_N_ms, name = "SCLC_N_score",assay = "SCT")

###Supplemental Table S3
Nabet_signatures <- list(
  NMF1  = SCLC_N_ms,
  NMF2 = SCLC_A_ms,
  NMF3  = SCLC_neI_ms,
  NMF4  = SCLC_nneI_ms
)
Nabet_signatures <- lapply(Nabet_signatures, function(x) as.character(unlist(x)))
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(lapply(Nabet_signatures, `length<-`, max(lengths(Nabet_signatures)))),
  "/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/Tables/Nabet_signatures_mouse.csv",
  row.names = FALSE,
  na = ""
)
###Figure 1g
NMF3 = TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=SCLC_neI_score1, fill=cell_type)) +
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("SCLC-NE-I") +
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

###Extended Data 2i
SCLC_N = TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE")))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=SCLC_N_score1, fill=cell_type))+
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +ylim(-0.05,0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("SCLC-N") +
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

###Extended Data 2h
SCLC_A = TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE")))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=SCLC_A_score1, fill=cell_type))+
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("SCLC-A")+ylim(-0.05,0.25)+
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

```

```{r}
#Gay et al 2021
df <- read_excel("/oak/stanford/scg/lab_julsage/Debbie/files/1-s2.0-S1535610820306620-mmc2.xlsx", 
                 sheet = "Mean expression of sig genes",
                 skip = 1)  # Skip the first row since it contains headers

# Set proper column names
colnames(df) <- c("Gene_Name", "SCLC_N", "SCLC_P", "SCLC_I", "SCLC_A")

# Convert expression columns to numeric (they might be read as character)
df$SCLC_N <- as.numeric(df$SCLC_N)
df$SCLC_P <- as.numeric(df$SCLC_P)
df$SCLC_I <- as.numeric(df$SCLC_I)
df$SCLC_A <- as.numeric(df$SCLC_A)

# Method 1: Using apply with which.max
df$Highest_Expression_Subtype <- apply(df[, c("SCLC_N", "SCLC_P", "SCLC_I", "SCLC_A")], 
                                       1, 
                                       function(x) {
                                         subtype_names <- c("SCLC-N", "SCLC-P", "SCLC-I", "SCLC-A")
                                         subtype_names[which.max(x)]
                                       })

# Display first few rows to verify
head(df)

SCLC_I_genes = subset(df, df$Highest_Expression_Subtype %in% "SCLC-I")
SCLC_N_genes = subset(df, df$Highest_Expression_Subtype %in% "SCLC-N")
SCLC_A_genes = subset(df, df$Highest_Expression_Subtype %in% "SCLC-A")
SCLC_P_genes = subset(df, df$Highest_Expression_Subtype %in% "SCLC-P")

SCLC_I_genes = subset(SCLC_I_genes, SCLC_I_genes$SCLC_I >=1)
SCLC_I_genes$p_i = SCLC_I_genes$SCLC_I - SCLC_I_genes$SCLC_P
SCLC_I_genes = subset(SCLC_I_genes, SCLC_I_genes$p_i >=0.5)

SCLC_I_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_I_genes$Gene_Name)
SCLC_I_ms = list(SCLC_I_ms)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = SCLC_I_ms, name = "SCLC_I_G_score",assay = "SCT")
SCLC_A_G_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_A_genes$Gene_Name)
SCLC_A_G_ms = list(SCLC_A_G_ms)

SCLC_N_G_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_N_genes$Gene_Name)
SCLC_N_G_ms = list(SCLC_N_G_ms)
TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = SCLC_N_ms, name = "SCLC_N_G_score",assay = "SCT")

SCLC_P_ms = convertHumanGeneList(SCLC_P_genes$Gene_Name)
SCLC_P_ms = list(SCLC_P_ms)

TKO_final_arc = AddModuleScore(TKO_final_arc, features = SCLC_P_ms, name = "SCLC_P_G_score",assay = "SCT")

###Extended Figure Data 2k
SCLC_I_G = TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE")))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=SCLC_I_G_score1, fill=cell_type))+
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("SCLC-I") +
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

###Extended Figure Data 2j
SCLC_P_G = TKO_final_arc@meta.data %>% 
  #filter(!cell_type %in% c("Generalist NE", "Generalist nonNE")) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = c("Neuroendocrine1","Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Generalist NE","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2","Generalist nonNE")))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x=cell_type, y=SCLC_P_G_score1, fill=cell_type))+
  geom_violin(width=0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_jitter(size = 0.001) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#cb76da","#8e403a","#3eab32","gray50","#4e8ee6","#f10c13","#f27a30","gray70")) +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("SCLC-P") +ylim(-0.05,0.2)+
  theme(legend.position="none", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15,  angle = 45,vjust=1, hjust = 1),axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),axis.title=element_text(size=15,face="bold"))

###Supplementary Table S3
#Exporting mouse version of Gay signatures
Gay_signatures <- list(
  SCLC_A  = SCLC_A_G_ms,
  SCLC_N = SCLC_N_G_ms,
  SCLC_I  = SCLC_I_ms,
  SCLC_P  = SCLC_P_ms
)
Gay_signatures <- lapply(Gay_signatures, function(x) as.character(unlist(x)))
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(lapply(Gay_signatures, `length<-`, max(lengths(Gay_signatures)))),
  "/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/Tables/Gay_signatures_mouse.csv",
  row.names = FALSE,
  na = ""
)
```

```{r}
###Figure 1i
palantir_data <- read_csv("/labs/julsage/Debbie/multiome_data/analysis_2/palantir_data.csv")
TKO_final_arc$pseudotime = palantir_data$palantir_pseudotime
plot_df <- data.frame(
  cell_id     = colnames(TKO_final_arc),
  pseudotime  = TKO_final_arc$pseudotime,
  cell_type   = TKO_final_arc$cell_type,
  NE_score    = TKO_final_arc$HES1_low_score1,      # [,1] converts matrix to vector
  nonNE_score = TKO_final_arc$HES1_high_score1
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(pseudotime)) %>%
  mutate(is_intermediate = cell_type == "Intermediate")

plot_long <- plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = c(NE_score, nonNE_score),
    names_to  = "program",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(program = recode(program,
                          "NE_score"    = "NE",
                          "nonNE_score" = "nonNE"))

program_colors <- c("NE" = "#cb76da", "nonNE" = "#f27a30")

ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = pseudotime, y = score, color = program)) +

  # Orange band first (behind everything)
  annotate("rect",
           xmin  = quantile(plot_df$pseudotime[plot_df$is_intermediate], 0.10),
           xmax  = quantile(plot_df$pseudotime[plot_df$is_intermediate], 0.90),
           ymin  = -Inf,
           ymax  = Inf,
           alpha = 0.08,
           fill  = "#4e8ee6") +

  # Smoothed trend across all cells
  geom_smooth(method    = "gam",
              formula   = y ~ s(x, bs = "cs"),
              se        = TRUE,
              alpha     = 0.15,
              linewidth = 1.2) +

  geom_point(data = filter(plot_df, is_intermediate),
           aes(x = pseudotime, y = (NE_score + nonNE_score) / 2),
           color = "#4e8ee6", size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6,
           shape = 16, inherit.aes = FALSE)+

  scale_color_manual(values = program_colors, name = NULL) +

  labs(
    x        = "Pseudotime",
    y        = "RNA module score",
    title    = "NE and nonNE program scores across pseudotime",
    subtitle = "Dots = Intermediate cells | Band = Intermediate pseudotime range"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(color = "grey40", size = 10)
  )

```

```{r}
###Figure 1j
DefaultAssay(TKO_final_arc)= "Imputed_counts"
Idents(TKO_final_arc) <- "cell_type"

# Define an order of cluster identities
my_levels <- c("Neuroendocrine1", "Neuroendocrine2",,"Stress","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2")

# Relevel object@ident
TKO_final_arc@ident <- factor(x = object@ident, levels = my_levels)

VlnPlot(
  object = TKO_final_arc,
  features = c("Ncam1","Icam1","Cd24a"),
  idents = c("Neuroendocrine1", "Neuroendocrine2","Stress","Intermediate","nonNE1","nonNE2"),
  pt.size = 0.3,
  stack = TRUE, flip = TRUE, cols = c("#c80a0a","#f90707","#f56d73","#f1adb0","#e3d3d3","#c0d3f3","#6e9bea","#3a7bee","#0c44a6"))+ xlab("") + ylab("") + theme(legend.position = "none")

```
